review_text: I would never stay here! Worst spot on the Gold Coast. We drove in and drove off. Lady is awful and wouldn’t even hear us out. I believe this place is a scam! They charge more than any other place knowing you won’t stay here. Be super careful.

Be careful not to book here, shes pretending to be Broadwater tourist park, taking full payment and not refunding. This place is awful. We paid her $900 not to stay here because it was super unsafe and foul, the worst park I’ve ever seen. We will be taking it a lot further but please beware!
DO NOT BOOK THIS PLACE WHATEVER YOU DO. Thief’s everywhere, and the office don’t care! The place is rundown and terrible.

been staying at the park on and off over 30 years met a lot of people there and still friends today. Everybody was pleasant to deal with. |have seen people come in with shopping trolleys but they got turned away.|had one night a few years ago play loud music and they were gone the next day.|very quiet at nighttime. We are from Victoria and stay in a cabin and it is nice and clean.
We camped here for two nights on our campervan and we had a wonderful experience. Staff is really nice, showers are clean and hot. Very quiet at night. Great price.

Whoever runs this place should be utterly disgusted in themselves for allowing such poor service, unclean premises and overall disappointing customer service and lack of maintenance. Would not recommend for any family or any individual in general to spend their money here!

CAMPERVAN place!!🌟
We went to the reception at around 8pm and even though it was already closed, the lady opened the door and spontaneously sold us a place to stay overnight, that was so kind!!😁we paid 70$ for two people even though we didn’t use the water or electricity!!
But the bathroom was very clean, and we were just happy about to stay there for a night. It’s close to the street, but very quiet during night, would RECOMMEND FOR STAYING WITH A CAMPER!!
This was a great place to stay..  quiet and  friendly. the staff were awesome. The cabin was well maintained. A good location.  I highly recommend and will stay again

I wish I could give this place 0 stars, the bathrooms were old and outdated covered in cobwebs and spiders, the toilets were filthy…clearly haven’t been cleaned in a long time. The manager is a very grumpy old lady who called me a “con artist” for not staying the night and also didn’t give me a refund so they got $90 for free (and I’m thnot con artist?) lol ! Avoid this place at all cost, don’t waste your money!!!

The Lady got angry and hung up on me haha. I'm so confused in the abrupt attitude change, I was in mid sentence too. Was enquiring about a long term stay I was quoted $900 a week with $200 bond for two bed cabin. I tried to ask for her name so when I called back later I could speak with her again, she asked when I had to move out by I said about two months as I said that she got angry and kept repeating "don't worry about it" I was literally mid sentence saying that I can leave anytime within the two months, when I've found appropriate accommodation/rental. Such bizarre inappropriate way to interact with customers. Anyway I've probably dodge a bullet considering their ratings, so feeling blessed.
The room we had was not clean mouse & cocky droppings all ova the cabin manger was a rude old lady.  Pool was out of service. The Cleaning lady was lovely... Ooo & they don't have WiFi
Cheerful & friendly, enjoyed my stay. I stay here everytime I come to Surfers Paradise.
It's a dump

In cottage 1 in the room right next to the bathroom do not turn on fan to level three the lights going with the blades old bunk bed and double bed service was great the owner is really nice but really old
Do not stay there under any circumstances.

It old but good and well price
My caravan fitted in well
Maybe a few security problems smack heads looking for a sleep but the whole place has cameras
Bathroom and toilets do the job with good hot water
Accueil deplorable,  la responsable est mal polie, pas de wi-fi,  à fuir !
Run away! Deplorable welcome from the Adams family, no hot water, no Wi-Fi $80 a night...

The motel photos are outdated and do not represent the current dilapidated state of the park, building material lying on the ground rubbish around. The rooms are outdated and look dirty and unkept, the appliances were outdated and the AC we were told didn’t work properly.
The parking was tiny for most cars.
The staff, while pleasant have limited English and argue with each other in front of customers which is confronting and confusing. This park needs an upgrade urgently and the price of over $800 for a week was exorbitant.
My parents for whom I booked had a medical emergency the day of check in and my dad was rushed to Brisbane and no refund was offered only a credit, which will never be used.
The owners were amazing with us. The amenities room it’s very comfortable. Maybe to have more lights during the night would be helpful 🙏🏻
Grateful for availability. Clean, hot water, comfortable, great service.

Upon arrival I was greeted by friendly staff and shown where my cabin is situated. Well appointed space to call home for a while. The bed was very comfy  and piping hot water. The air con got things cool quickly and large family sized fridge in the kitchen. The cleaning & maintenance staff always greeted me as I walked past. Recommend stopping here for a well earned break. Geat holiday time. Thanks

This place is a scam. Do not stay here!!! We paid $250 for this so called “Deluxe Villa” that was covered in large dead ants and a few that were still moving. Not only that, this place was absolutely filthy, dust everywhere, stench filled, and the sheets are in the state of unwash for ages, covered in dust (and ants of course). Our findings shocked us and we were afraid to inspect under the sheets.

We tried cleaning up so that we’d feel more comfortable staying here but it wasn’t enough for us. Especially with the man in the unit opposite ours, doing drugs. We left after an hour and sent an email requesting a refund but we’ve been ignored. How can anyone offer such a place, call it a “Deluxe Villa” and charge $250 a night. We won’t even stay here for free. This place is a scam and based on the other reviews too, Southport Tourist Park should be investigated and shut down. This place shouldn’t be allowed to stay open.

DO NOT STAY HERE!!!! You’re way better off sleeping in the car like we did after we left or find another place to spend the night. Just not here! The pictures on this and the website are heavily edited and fake. If the owner dares to challenge our claims, please visit this place and witness the disgust, drug use, and the utter sham of this establishment yourself. Please refer to the images we’ve attached, showing our horrid experience at Southport Tourist Park. Here are the real pictures and state of Southport Tourist Park. (We have videos too but we can only attach photos).

We called reception and was hung up on.
We walked in to view site and was told to leave.
Lucky we did looked disgusting 🫣
The 'tourist park' that is not very accommodating to actual tourist's.
Not good service and very low maintained. Not value for money. Was very dirty.
Tried to book a night but the lady in the reception was rude and just hung up the phone while I was trying to talk and book a site.
Beautiful comfortable quiet and clean

I find it quite dangerous as the smoke alarm was hanging from the ceiling. Obviously illegal. Although the stove doesn't work I still  would never bring a child here . There were always police around and just a horrible environment

The place is horrible. The elderly lady that runs it mainly gets housos. Today she kicked out a young couple with a newborn because the mother in law who they can't stay with visited. Also a clean living 30 year old man was kicked out because his quiet brother visited to bring some belongings. I get the no parties and noise this but these people were innocent. I am sitting in my cabin with bed bugs crying.

We were thankful to get a spot here when everything else on the Gold Coast was booked out. We have paid a premium of $70 per night which was still ok just being thankful to get in. From here the review goes downhill, this would have to be one of the least maintained parks we have ever stayed at, and we have stayed at a lot of parks. It is fair enough that it is an old park we can accept that but really, keep your lawns trimmed and your pathways cleared, tidy up the fencing falling down, level off the paths that are sinking and tidy up the office. I believe it has just been sold so hopefully the new owner does something with it.
Dora is a queen!!! The workers were so helpful and lovely. We stayed in a campervan, so cannot comment on the rooms, but services were fab. Spa was brilliant!!

we had our own RV so didn’t stay in the rooms so have no comment about them, but as for the service it was good, the lady was very nice to us, let us know that some dodgy people keep coming into the park and informed us of security cameras, numbers etc. we had no issues. as per the people who live here, they are not the rich or famous but they were all super friendly kept to themselves and would even go as far as to say if we were outside especially at night they stayed clear of us as a group of young girls. the pool was lovely and the location was great. we can all honestly say we had a lovely stay and we’re treated with respect and felt safe. wouldn’t be appropriate for young children though as i feel the people staying there may dabble in substances (same car driving in and out all night going to different trailers)

Most horrible experience of my life. Do not stay here.
Dora is a scary rude lady just don't care about other people and just take there money and call the police on them.

Rooms where disgusting, not just one but all three of the cabins I had went in. Bed bugs. The owner was screaming at another tenant after barging into his cabin, cops had to be called on her.
I was treated with respect only when I let her talk down to me, I demanded a refund and left asap.
Staff are lovely owner Dora is very kind and the place is lovely and tranquil family friendly just a genuine place of serenity

It's cheap an it looks cheap the bathroom and toilet very dirty the so called kitchen is disgusting never bin cleaned then to top it off while you stay no friends or family are aloud to visit and your not allowed to talk or ask anyone for an hand or a coffee it's a joke the old lady there should go away an hate the world some where else she ruined my stay

Although the park is well worn in, my wife and I were given a very warm welcome by our hostess Nora, who gave us an immaculate clean and comfortable cabin. Just off the main road but still nice and quiet for sleeping and was close to all amenities. I would recommend this park to anyone who is doing a quick visit to the Goldie.
Worst place ever made us clean cabins owes my husband 5 grand because he built a web site for her. She cries poor me but she will use anyone that needs a place RUN
By far the rudest and worst customer service I’ve experienced

I am glad I read the reviews before I stayed here. I am relocating for work and I rang to ask if they did long term stays with weekly rates because I will be moving over for work. The first lady I spoke to i couldn't understand a word she was saying and she kept asking if I was coming over for work, if I already had a job, when do I start and where will I be working and who will I be working for. I thought was quite odd as that is not something they would need to know. Then she proceeded to ask if I will be traveling with family, pets or alone and I told her alone. I just need somewhere to stay until I can secure me a house. She then said she will have a look to see what is available and handed the phone to another lady for me to give my number to so they can contact me. While the other lady was grabbing my details I just asked that they email me the information that should he enough and she said ok then the first lady I was speaking to was talking in the background telling her to get my number so I gave it. Then come for the time to end the call she hops back on the phone and says we have accomodation for for and it will be $1000 a week. I told them just email me the quote and she said no I'm telling you now what it is. If you want it you have to pay now on the phone. So I told them I will contact them as inhave other places to look at. Customer service skills are shocking and seems she just ages up prices that suits her... so nope I will not be staying here.

Wish we looked at the reviews first.
2.6 stars is actually very kind. Wow just wow do not stay here booked for 2 nights on a powered site. Pool area dinghy & old Drove in and drove straight out feel like your staying at the bronx does not feel safe absolute rubbish. Messy and dirty. The owner would not refund money. RUDE Hopefully you spend the $140 on some clean up materials. Went directly across the road and was cheaper. Highly recommend Broadwater Tourist Park. $7 cheaper clean & great pool area. Owner was lovely.

Disgusting, awful, terrible place. Toilets are filthy, don't get cleaned on weekends. There's no disability railings or anything in the toilets, my chronically ill mother got stuck in the bathtub, very distressing for both her and my father that had to help her get out. $700 a week for two people in a tiny cabin with no hot water, using the communal bathroom, broken tiles, nails sticking out of walls (very hard to see if you aren't paying close attention). The whole place looks run down and basically abandoned, you'd think that the owner would have some more pride in her business but I guess she doesn't care much. Next thing is the laundry, pay $700 a week in rent and still have to pay to use a washing machine that probably doesn't get cleaned. Staff will just open the door to your cabin nd come in if they need to talk to you, the $700 should include privacy. The owner also said that if my mother asked for a room on her own, she wouldn't have let her stay because she looks like a 'junkie'. That is the most disgusting thing to say about a woman who has been in and out of hospital for ten years, her stomach doesn't work so she is skinny, but the owner immediately assumed she was on drugs. I don't doubt that the owner does drugs, especially if she thinks her cabins are worth $700 a week.

The owner, Dora I believe her name is, also accused my mother of leaving dirty needles in the cabin, and said one of her female cleaners got pricked by it. First and foremost, there was no needles left behind, I was there to help my parents pack and clean. And second of all, what female cleaner? My mother told me that there was always MEN cleaning the women's toilets, why are the male cleaners cleaning the women's toilets if there are female cleaners employed as well?
The whole park looked unkempt and rundown. The most expen sive nightly rate for the worst experience of our trip. No Wifi even though advertised. No dump station for campers.
